tasks.title: Scaffold Vite React PWA + FSD skeleton
tasks.dod: Dev server and production build succeed; FSD skeleton and router shell render placeholder routes; PWA manifest stub registered.

tasks.title: Promote IndexedDB v1 schema migration
tasks.dod: Staged migration promoted to src/shared/storage/migrations/; fake-indexeddb test proves all stores and indexes apply and revert cleanly.

tasks.title: Define planner domain types and validation
tasks.dod: Unit tests pass for prefix parsing, title validation, duplicate-step guard, and domain sentinel errors.

tasks.title: Implement IndexedDB repositories
tasks.dod: Repository integration tests verify ordered queries, latest-long-term selection, cascade delete, and export bulk-read helpers.

tasks.title: Build shared UI primitives
tasks.dod: Input, Button, Checkbox, ConfirmDialog, and InlineError render with accessibility smoke tests; ConfirmDialog withholds action until confirmed.

tasks.title: Implement quick-add feature
tasks.dod: Unit tests cover all prefix branches and error paths; successful submits persist via repositories.

tasks.title: Implement task-crud feature
tasks.dod: Unit tests cover daily, goal, and step complete/edit/delete with confirm-gated deletes and blank-title rejection.

tasks.title: Implement rollover feature
tasks.dod: Unit tests verify day-transition, uncapped multi-day rollover block, and move/complete/edit/delete actions.

tasks.title: Implement backup export/import service
tasks.dod: Unit tests verify versioned export, invalid-file no-op, replace overwrite, merge id-dedup, and unconfirmed import block.

tasks.title: Build dashboard page
tasks.dod: Dashboard integrates quick-add, today list, rolled-over block, and long-term nav; component tests cover primary flows.

tasks.title: Build long-term page
tasks.dod: Long-term page shows progress counts and expandable step checklists with confirm-gated deletes; navigation from dashboard works.

tasks.title: Build backup settings UI
tasks.dod: Export download and import replace/merge flows require explicit confirmation; invalid backup shows error with no writes.

tasks.title: Wire PWA offline shell
tasks.dod: Installable production build loads dashboard offline and supports read/write via IndexedDB after airplane-mode smoke test.

tasks.title: Compose app routing and empty-state recovery
tasks.dod: Tab/nav routing connects dashboard, long-term, and settings; empty store shows backup-import recovery guidance.

tasks.title: Add core integration tests
tasks.dod: Integration tests pass for persistence-after-reload, export completeness, import replace/merge, and invalid import no-op.
